description: Rework SKILL.md so the default flow is one agent claim→work→review→close→done; demote the separate-reviewer pattern to an opt-in section. Add a matching stance paragraph to README. Update lifecycle.rs review output to point at 'bl close' as the next step rather than implying a handoff. Principle: 'task is in review' as a stopping point (without a configured reviewer) is a footgun that makes agents stop short of finishing.
title: SKILL/README: default is single-agent, review handoff opt-in
